name: 422 Sportsplex
description: Come play pickleball at 422 Sportsplex in Pottstown, PA! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Ashbridge Park
description: No play on Sundays.

name: Bo Connor Park
description:
1 Stand-alone dedicated pickleball court
Nets not provided/bring your own equipment
Free and open to the public, first come first serve dawn till dusk, no reservations allowed.
open_play_schedule: Park is open dawn to dusk

name: Branchwood Park
description: Branchwood Park is a place to play pickleball in Telford, PA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Clem Macrone Park
description: Come play pickleball at Clem Macrone Park in Bryn Mawr, PA! There are 2 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: Park is open dawn to dusk

description: Come play pickleball at Colwell park in Conshohocken, PA! The courts are free.

name: HPTA-Riverside Tennis Club
description:
Open Play times are level-based. Thursday evenings (5:30-7:30pm) is family play, and geared towards those with children of all ages looking to play. All open play attendees must have basic knowledge of the game, and be able to serve. 

An HPTA account (no charge) will be needed for billing purposes. Information can be given on-site, or via email to info@hpta-riverside.com
